title: Create: Superflat
description: A simple mod to add recipes to allow for the complete use of the Create Mod in a superflat world. Also includes a few quality of life features to attempt to tone down the amount of grinding or AFK to play superflat.
body:
A simple mod that adds recipes for the complete use of the Create mod in a superflat world.

The main features are adding a simple asurine milling recipe to get zinc without crushing wheels and a compacting recipe to get asurine.

Also includes other QoL recipes and items. You can saw terracotta into bricks and mill those into brick dust that can then be washed into clay, which makes it so that you don't need to search villages for the few clay blocks they might have.
